{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240138041B2498646DF1FC891B83"}"},"total":314},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7494202832356999998","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的封神同人文，作者到处收义子太6了，尤其不黑女娲这点太赞同了，正统神话里女娲娘娘就是正面神仙，位格战力应该是高于三清的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744882697,"group_id":"7448099804820819006","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3/H7A6YCsh4s1+PL22Rl3Y=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c156211d32a048babc5bf86a6baa33cf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878911&x-signature=4AV2%2BLGWDzJFaNvpHS5faYMBUbE%3D","user_id":"884478197901479","user_name":"碧落呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"884478197901479","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7448099804820819006","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+稳健+杀伐果断+不当人啦】
穿越封神帝辛，殷寿正被比干催着去上香！
面对圣人算计，殷寿岂能甘心束手就擒？！
一怒之下，开局就把女娲庙拆了！
准提想阴他？
殷寿反手敕令西方教为异教！凡信仰西方教者皆为淫祀！人族不灭西方教不兴！
太清老子也想插一手？
那太好了，殷寿一道旨意废人教！收崆峒印，聚拢人族气运！
元始天尊扯天道大旗，兴周灭商？
那就联姻万族，以众生意志抗衡天道意志！
通天无药可救，不见棺材不掉泪？
殷寿组建执法大队，赵公明、三宵、五大圣母，多宝统统入伙，干爆阐教！
拯救女魃精卫，守护世间一切美好，觉醒言出法随、人道封神！
收四猴，点天地人三灯，穿梭往古，洞悉洪荒历史真相，觉醒人道杀戮真身!
某一天当殷寿站在人道至尊之巅，蓦然回首这才发现，原来人道才是三道之首，万道至尊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8b1d290137e705b0bf834f79be31d528","author":"九鼎都护府","author_id":"","book_id":"7448099804820819006","book_name":"满洪荒老银币，唯有帝辛正的发邪","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4598人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7450497646394868286","read_count":"4598","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"816771"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"376","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,洪荒,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0d89b591f09a6d9c0bfde4a4dbdf5e34~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779471485&x-signature=YeNfVx0fWHNec7HuwiHYuXH4Qho%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1890792829616381","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"321"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240138041B2498646DF1FC891B83"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forw
